General information

Forum about internet culture, usernames, and accounts.

Looksmax.org
Forum about appearance, self-improvement, and lifestyle topics.

DuckDuckGo
Search engine that does not track users.

StartPage

HackForums
Forum about programming, technology, and security.

Pastebin
Site for sharing text snippets and code.

Coinbase
Cryptocurrency exchange platform.

Binance
Global cryptocurrency trading platform.

CoinMarketCap
Tracks cryptocurrency prices and rankings.

Temp Mail
Disposable temporary email service.

Archive.org
Internet Archive for websites, books, and media.

PrivacyGuides.org
Website with guides for privacy tools.

VirusTotal
Scans files using dozens of antivirus engines to detect malware.

Have I Been Pwned
Checks whether an email address or password appears in known data breaches.

URLVoid
Checks a website's reputation using multiple blacklists and security services.

Guerrilla Mail
Temporary email service that allows sending and receiving messages anonymously.

Catbox
Simple file hosting service for sharing images and files through direct links.

Uguu~
Minimal anonymous file upload service with no account required.

file.io
Temporary file sharing where uploaded files delete themselves after being downloaded.

Mullvad
Privacy-focused VPN that does not require personal information to sign up.
http://o54hon2e2vj6c7m3aqqu6uyece65by3vgoxxhlqlsvkmacw6a7m7kiad.onion

Namechk
Checks username availability across many social networks.

Blockchain.com
Blockchain explorer for viewing cryptocurrency transactions and wallet activity.

ProPublica
Nonprofit investigative journalism organization that publishes on corruption, abuse of power, and public interest issues.
https://www.propub3r6espa33w.onion

BBC News
International news service from the British Broadcasting Corporation.

The Hidden Wiki
Long-running directory of Tor .onion websites.

ONION.live
A comprehensive search engine for onion hidden services on the darknet.

Bizzle
Community forum for sharing knowledge on Hacking, Carding, Cryptocurrency, Fraud, and Scams.

stopCP
Almost all Tor users know that there are many problems in the deep web. But among them, one stands out - child porn.

Ahmia
Ahmia searches hidden services on the Tor network.
http://juhanurmihxlp77nkq76byazcldy2hlmovfu2epvl5ankdibsot4csyd.onion/

Dread
Dread is an onion based free speech platform and forum.

Darknet Bible
The Darknet Bible is a guide for newbies to get them started on safe opsec, and navigating the Darknet

ImageGirl
Image sharing platform with direct upload.

Tor Taxi
Anti-phishing resource for darknet sites and record darknet history.

OnionShare
OnionShare is an open source tool that lets you securely and anonymously share files

TorBox
TorBox is an anonymous, hidden mailbox service only accessible from Tor.

The Pirate Bay
The Pirate Bay is an online index of digital content of entertainment media and software.

DarkSearch
DarkSearch is a darknet search engine based on DarkBERT as a BERT-like model.

Eternal
File host with zero access encryption and files are hosted for 3 months. 500MB maximum file size.

FitGirl Repacks
FitGirl Repacks is known for repacking games.

SteamRiP
SteamRiP is a site that provides free pre-installed steam games.

Exploit Database
Archive of security vulnerabilities and exploit code.

HackTricks
Huge collection of penetration testing techniques and guides.
